_cite.reason: Span re-point (item 3): fact_span_not_in_source FACT whose span is verbatim in another pool source — re-point search_result_id/source_id/tier to the source that contains it. Deterministic, no LLM. Operator ruling 2026-07-04.

prior.claim_text: "The benchmarking process will be dynamic, with a first review scheduled for 2026. This review is intended to take account of the updated FAO FRA data, expected to be published in October 2025."
prior.source_span: The benchmarking process will be dynamic, with a first review scheduled for 2026. This review is intended to take account of the updated FAO FRA data, expected to be published in October 2025.
